name: Stories exist but the configured glob misses them
query: Storybook says it found zero stories even though we have .stories.tsx files.
context: The user shares one real story path and a main config whose stories glob only targets a different directory and file type.
expected_behavior: Explains that Storybook is not scanning the file pattern that actually exists
Recommends the narrowest glob or path correction
success_criteria: The response does not drift into builder migration advice
The response gives one exact next step
